# ChatSupport UI Custom Package Setup Instructions

This project is configured as a custom npm package with React components using TypeScript and Storybook for component documentation.

## Project Overview
- **Type**: Custom npm package (UI components)
- **Language**: TypeScript
- **Framework**: React 19
- **Testing**: Jest, React Testing Library
- **Documentation**: Storybook
- **Package Manager**: npm

## Project Structure
```
chatsupport-ui/
├── src/
│   ├── components/
│   ├── hooks/
│   ├── types/
│   └── index.ts
├── dist/
├── stories/
├── .storybook/
├── tests/
├── package.json
├── tsconfig.json
├── tsconfig.build.json
└── README.md
```

## Development Scripts
- `npm run build` - Build the package for distribution
- `npm run dev` - Watch mode for development
- `npm run storybook` - Start Storybook dev server
- `npm test` - Run Jest tests
- `npm run lint` - Run TypeScript type checking

## Setup Process Completed
- ✅ Project structure created
- ✅ TypeScript configured with proper compilation settings
- ✅ Dependencies installed
- ✅ Build system configured
- ✅ Testing setup configured
- ✅ Storybook configured for component documentation
- ✅ VS Code tasks configured
